title: Backscroll Web UI (bsc ui)
overview: `bsc ui` launches a loopback-only HTTP server (127.0.0.1, OS-assigned port, one-time token) serving a React + Vite + Tailwind SPA for browsing recorded command history: virtualized 10k+ list, search-as-you-type, success/cwd/time filters, scrollable output pane. Read-only against the existing SQLite/FTS5 store. Scope is view + search + copy + re-run, where re-run executes nothing server-side — it queues the chosen command and `bsc ui` prints it on exit for `eval "$(bsc ui)"` in the user's own shell.
scopeChallenge: Phase 0 locked: local web UI (over TUI / enhanced-picker), EXPANSION mode, scope view+search+copy+re-run. Security posture is the make-or-break for a web server on a 'no network ever' tool: bind 127.0.0.1 only (never 0.0.0.0); one-time crypto token required on all /api/*; strict CSP default-src 'self' so the SPA cannot make external requests; NO server-side process execution (re-run only queues intent, CLI prints on exit) so the loopback server is not an RCE surface; API serves only already-redacted stored data. React/Vite/Tailwind are devDependencies — the build emits static assets shipped in the package; runtime deps stay better-sqlite3/commander/node-pty/picocolors (server uses Node http/crypto, no Express). Ruled out: TUI, enhanced-picker, server-side re-run, any external asset.

failureModes.risk: Server binds 0.0.0.0, exposing history on the LAN
failureModes.mitigation: Explicit host '127.0.0.1'; integration test asserts loopback (TASK-018).

failureModes.risk: Missing/weak API auth lets other local users read history
failureModes.mitigation: Random crypto token required on every /api/* request; 401 otherwise; test (TASK-018).

failureModes.risk: Server-side command execution becomes an RCE surface
failureModes.mitigation: Server never spawns a process; re-run only queues intent; the CLI prints the command on exit; tests assert no exec (TASK-017/018).

failureModes.risk: Missing CSP lets the SPA be coerced into external requests
failureModes.mitigation: Strict CSP default-src 'self' on every response; header asserted in TASK-018.

failureModes.risk: SPA not shipped, so bsc ui 404s after global install
failureModes.mitigation: dist-ui in package files[]; build chains build:ui; ui command errors clearly if the dir is missing.
Virtualized list plus server-side offset pagination.
Fetch detail on demand; render output in a bounded scroll container.
Listen on port 0 (OS-assigned) and read the actual port back.

failureModes.risk: Token leaks to an external site via referrer
failureModes.mitigation: Referrer-Policy: no-referrer plus CSP blocking external navigation.
Mirror DTOs; a field rename in contract.ts breaks the FE build (caught by build:ui).
API serves only stored, already-redacted data; no raw path exists.

testCoverageMap.codepath: API handlers: search params, pagination, 404, rerun-intent
Loopback bind, token 401/200, CSP header, rerun no-exec
bsc ui launch, stderr URL, stdout rerun print
SPA builds clean with no external assets
Filter to query to list to detail interaction

tasks.title: API contract DTOs
tasks.description: Create src/server/contract.ts with the JSON shapes shared by server and SPA: ApiSearchResponse {results: ApiResult[]; total; offset; limit}, ApiResult (id, command, cwd, gitBranch, exitCode, startedAt, durationMs, source, snippet), ApiCommandDetail (full CommandRecord incl. output), ApiStats {total; bySource; firstAt; lastAt}, RerunRequest {id}, RerunResponse {ok; command}. Pure types.
acceptanceCriteria: All DTOs compile under strict mode with no any
ApiSearchResponse includes total, offset, limit for pagination
Types are import-safe (no runtime side effects)

tasks.title: Store pagination, count, and stats
tasks.description: Add offset?:number to SearchFilters in src/types.ts. In src/db/store.ts: honor offset in search() (LIMIT @limit OFFSET @offset); add countCommands(filters):number (same WHERE, SELECT count(*)); add getStats() returning {total, bySource, firstAt, lastAt}.
acceptanceCriteria: search({query, limit:10, offset:10}) returns rows 11-20, disjoint from offset 0
countCommands(filters) equals matching rows ignoring limit/offset
getStats() on an empty store returns total:0, firstAt:null, lastAt:null without throwing

tasks.title: Static file server with strict CSP
tasks.description: Create src/server/static.ts: serveStatic(req,res,rootDir) resolving a path to a file under rootDir (SPA fallback to index.html), correct Content-Type, and security headers on every response (CSP default-src 'self'; base-uri 'none'; frame-ancestors 'none'; X-Content-Type-Options: nosniff; Referrer-Policy: no-referrer). Reject path traversal.
acceptanceCriteria: /assets/app.js returns the file with correct Content-Type and the CSP header
An unknown non-API path returns index.html (SPA fallback)
A traversal attempt (/../../etc/passwd) is rejected with 403, never escaping rootDir

tasks.title: API request handlers
tasks.description: Create src/server/api.ts: handlers taking a Store and returning contract DTOs. handleSearch parses q/cwd/success/since/until/limit/offset (parseTimeSpec for times; clamp limit<=200), calls store.search + store.countCommands. handleCommand(id) returns detail or 404. handleStats. handleRerunIntent(id, queue) looks up the command, pushes to the queue, returns it — NEVER executes.
acceptanceCriteria: handleSearch with success=true&since=3w returns only exit-0 rows in the window plus a correct total
handleCommand returns full output for a valid id and 404 for a missing id
handleRerunIntent records the command and returns it, and never spawns a process
An invalid since (bare '3') yields a 400 with a clear message, not a crash

tasks.title: Loopback HTTP server (token auth, routing, rerun queue)
tasks.description: Create src/server/server.ts: startServer({store, staticDir}) returning {url, port, token, rerun:string[], close()}. Node http, listen on 127.0.0.1 port 0, crypto.randomBytes token. Route /api/* through a token gate (header or ?token=; 401 otherwise) to api.ts; everything else to static.ts. Hold the in-memory rerun queue. Never spawns a process.
acceptanceCriteria: Server binds 127.0.0.1 only (a LAN-IP connection is refused)
/api/stats without the token returns 401; with the correct token returns 200
close() releases the port (a subsequent startServer succeeds)

tasks.title: bsc ui command
tasks.description: Create src/commands/ui.ts: open the store (getDb), resolve the built SPA dir (dist-ui relative to the package), startServer, print the tokenized URL to stderr, open the browser (open/xdg-open/start via child_process, skippable), await SIGINT. On exit, if the rerun queue is non-empty, print the most recent queued command to stdout, then close().
acceptanceCriteria: Prints a http://127.0.0.1:<port>/?token=... URL to stderr (not stdout)
On exit with a queued re-run, prints the chosen command to stdout (nothing else on stdout)
If the SPA build dir is missing, exits non-zero with a clear 'run npm run build' message

tasks.title: Register ui in the CLI
tasks.description: Modify src/cli.ts: register the ui command with options --no-open (don't launch a browser) and --port <n> (override the OS-assigned port). Wire to uiCommand.
acceptanceCriteria: bsc --help lists ui
bsc ui --no-open starts the server without spawning a browser
--port with a non-numeric value errors cleanly via the existing error boundary

tasks.title: Frontend build tooling (Vite + Tailwind v4)
tasks.description: Modify package.json: add devDependencies (react, react-dom, @types/react, @types/react-dom, vite, @vitejs/plugin-react, tailwindcss@4, @tailwindcss/vite, @tanstack/react-virtual) and scripts (dev:ui, build:ui); chain build:ui into the main build. Create ui/vite.config.ts (root:'ui', build.outDir:'../dist-ui', base:'./', plugins react + tailwind). No new runtime deps.
acceptanceCriteria: npm install succeeds and build:ui emits to dist-ui/
base:'./' so assets load with relative URLs under the served origin
The main npm run build runs both the tsc/server build and the SPA build

tasks.title: SPA entry (index.html, main, styles)
tasks.description: Create ui/index.html (root div + module script), ui/src/main.tsx (React root mounting App), ui/src/index.css (@import 'tailwindcss' + dark base). No external font/CDN links (CSP forbids them).
acceptanceCriteria: build:ui produces index.html + hashed JS/CSS in dist-ui/
No link/script to any external origin (self-contained)
Mounts without console errors against a stubbed empty API

tasks.title: Frontend API client + mirrored types
tasks.description: Create ui/src/api-types.ts (mirror of src/server/contract.ts, kept in sync manually) and ui/src/api.ts: a typed fetch client that reads the token from location.search, sends it on every request, and exposes search(filters)/getCommand(id)/getStats()/rerun(id). Surfaces 401/4xx as typed errors.
acceptanceCriteria: Every request includes the token from the URL
A 401 surfaces a distinct 'unauthorized' error the UI can show
Types match contract.ts (a field rename there is a compile break here)

tasks.title: Frontend formatting utilities
tasks.description: Create ui/src/util/format.ts: relativeTime(ms, now), duration(ms), statusClass(exitCode). Browser-side, no Node imports, now injected.
acceptanceCriteria: relativeTime returns 'just now' for <1min and 'Nw ago' for weeks
duration(null) returns a dash, not 'NaN'
Pure functions with now injected (no baked Date.now())

tasks.title: SearchBar + filters component
tasks.description: Create ui/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: debounced query input, success-only toggle, cwd filter, since/until inputs; emits a SearchFilters-shaped object via callback. Tailwind-styled, Esc clears.
acceptanceCriteria: Typing debounces (<=1 callback per ~150ms burst)
Toggling success-only and editing cwd both propagate to the emitted filters
Empty query is allowed (browse-all), not blocked

tasks.title: Virtualized result list
tasks.description: Create ui/src/components/ResultList.tsx: virtualized list (@tanstack/react-virtual) over ApiResult[], showing status glyph, relative time, cwd, command; selectable rows (arrow keys + click); requests the next page (offset) on scroll-near-end. Uses util/format.
acceptanceCriteria: Rendering 10,000 results keeps the DOM node count bounded (virtualized)
Scrolling near the end triggers a next-page (offset) fetch exactly once per boundary
Selecting a row (click or arrows+Enter) invokes the selection callback with the row id

tasks.title: Detail pane (output viewer + copy + re-run)
tasks.description: Create ui/src/components/DetailPane.tsx: given a selected id, fetch the full command, render a metadata header (cwd, branch, exit, time, duration, source) and a scrollable monospace output area; Copy command (navigator.clipboard) and Re-run (api.rerun(id) then show 'queued; quit bsc ui to run it'). Uses util/format.
acceptanceCriteria: Selecting a command loads and shows its full output in a scrollable area
Copy puts the command on the clipboard; a command with no output shows '(no output captured)'
Re-run calls the rerun endpoint and shows the queued confirmation; it does NOT execute in browser/server

tasks.title: App shell wiring
tasks.description: Create ui/src/App.tsx: two-pane layout (list + detail) with a header showing getStats() totals; holds filter + selection state; wires SearchBar -> results query, ResultList -> selection, DetailPane -> detail; handles the unauthorized error with a clear message.
acceptanceCriteria: Editing filters updates the list; selecting a row updates the detail pane
The header shows total command count from /api/stats
An unauthorized (bad/missing token) state renders a clear message, not a blank screen

tasks.title: Package the SPA build output
tasks.description: Modify .gitignore to ignore dist-ui/ (a build artifact). The files[] array that ships dist-ui in npm is owned by TASK-008's package.json edit.
acceptanceCriteria: dist-ui/ is gitignored (not committed)
node_modules/dist ignores remain intact
No source under ui/ is ignored

tasks.title: API handler tests
tasks.description: Create test/api.test.ts: against an in-memory store with seeded rows, assert handleSearch (filters + pagination total/offset), handleCommand (hit + 404), handleStats, and handleRerunIntent (queues, returns command, spawns nothing).
acceptanceCriteria: Search pagination returns correct total and disjoint pages
Missing-id command request yields 404
Rerun-intent pushes to the queue and the handler imports no child_process

tasks.title: Server security integration test
tasks.description: Create test/server.test.ts: start the real server, assert it listens on 127.0.0.1; /api/stats without token -> 401, with token -> 200; a static response carries the CSP header; the rerun endpoint records intent without executing (queue grows, no process spawned).
acceptanceCriteria: Unauthorized API request returns 401; authorized returns 200
The server host is loopback (127.0.0.1), never 0.0.0.0
A static response includes Content-Security-Policy: default-src 'self'

tasks.title: Store pagination/stats tests
tasks.description: Create test/store-pagination.test.ts: against :memory:, seed N rows and assert search offset paging is disjoint and ordered, countCommands matches filtered totals, and getStats reports correct totals/first/last including the empty-store edge case.
acceptanceCriteria: Page 1 (offset 0) and page 2 (offset=limit) share no rows
countCommands with a filter equals the number of matching rows
getStats on an empty store returns zeros/nulls without throwing

tasks.title: README — bsc ui + privacy guarantees
tasks.description: Modify README.md: document bsc ui (quickstart, --no-open, the eval "$(bsc ui)" re-run idiom) and a prominent note on the loopback-only / one-time-token / no-egress / no-server-exec guarantees, plus that the SPA ships pre-built.
acceptanceCriteria: Documents launching, the token URL, and --no-open
States the four guarantees: 127.0.0.1-only, token-gated, no external egress (CSP), no server-side execution
Explains the eval "$(bsc ui)" re-run flow accurately
